controls.notes:
Rule does not check or remediate config files included via
confdir and sourcedir directives.
controls.title: Ensure chrony is configured with authorized timeserver (Manual)

controls.notes:
Current benchmark requires cron.allow group owned by
root which will cause cron have no access. See ticket:
https://workbench.cisecurity.org/tickets/21619

controls.notes: Rule allows either SHA512 or YESCRYPT
controls.title: Ensure strong password hashing algorithm is configured (Automated)
Ensure inactive password lock is configured (Automated)
Ensure all users last password change date is in the past (Automated)
Ensure root is the only UID 0 account (Automated)
Ensure root is the only GID 0 account (Automated)
Ensure group root is the only GID 0 group (Automated)

controls.notes:
This rule doesn't come with a remediation, as the exact requirement allows root to either
have a password or be locked.
